name: Japandi Tray
subtitle: Parametric STL
description: Rounded Japandi tray with adjustable length, width, wall height, floor thickness, and rib relief.

dimensionTargets: Default tray length is 190.057 mm, measured on the source STL rotated footprint long axis.
Default tray width is 110.057 mm, measured on the source STL rotated footprint short axis.
Default tray wall height is 20.000 mm, measured on the source STL Z axis.
Length and width are independently adjustable so the square source tray can become an oblong tray.
Floor thickness remaps the lower floor band independently from wall height.
Rib relief scales the existing vertical side texture without changing target footprint length, width, or height.
invariants: Keep the tray centered on its source axis while changing dimensions.
Change tray length and width on the source tray footprint axes independently.
Change tray wall height on the Z axis without changing selected length or width.
Keep selected floor thickness below selected wall height.
Keep rib relief within the configured range so side texture remains printable.
Preserve the source STL as the original overlay reference.

scripts.name: audit
scripts.description: Validates the Japandi tray JSON, source STL dimensions, parameter limits, and tray-specific invariants.
